sentences.arabic: تُواجِهُ الْحَوَاضِرُ التَّارِيخِيَّةُ فِي الْعَصْرِ الرَّاهِنِ تَحَدِّيًا وُجُودِيًّا كَبِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Historijski centri u savremenom dobu suočavaju se s velikim egzistencijalnim izazovom.
sentences.translationEn: Historical hubs in the contemporary era face a major existential challenge, manifested in the dominance of excessive and unregulated mass tourism.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَثَّلُ هَذَا فِي طُغْيَانِ السِّياحَةِ الْجَمَاهِيرِيَّةِ الْمُفْرِطَةِ وَغَيْرِ الْمُنَظَّمَةِ.
sentences.translation: To se ogleda u prevlasti prekomjernog i neorganiziranog masovnog turizma.
sentences.translationEn: This phenomenon has begun to threaten the authentic urban and social fabric.

sentences.arabic: بَاتَتْ هَذِهِ الظَّاهِرَةُ تُهَدِّدُ النَّسِيجَ الْعُمْرَانِيَّ وَالِاجْتِمَاعِيَّ الْأَصِيلَ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj fenomen počeo je ugrožavati izvornu urbanu i društvenu strukturu.
sentences.translationEn: Intense human encroachment leads to the dilution of the cultural specificity of cities.

sentences.arabic: الزَّحْفُ الْبَشَرِيُّ الْكَثِيفُ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى تَمْيِيعِ الْخُصُوصِيَّةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ لِلْمُدُنِ.
sentences.translation: Intenzivno ljudsko nadiranje dovodi do razvodnjavanja kulturne specifičnosti gradova.
sentences.translationEn: Some capitals are turning into silent, faded, and hollow museums.

sentences.arabic: تَتَحَوَّلُ بَعْضُ الْعَوَاصِمِ إِلَى مَتَاحِفَ صَمَّاءَ بَاهِتَةٍ وَخَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Neke prijestolnice pretvaraju se u nijeme, izblijedjele i prazne muzeje.
sentences.translationEn: These places are gradually losing the pulse of their original inhabitants and their daily vitality.

sentences.arabic: تَفْقِدُ هَذِهِ الْأَمَاكِنُ نَبْضَ سُكَّانِهَا الْأَصْلِيِّينَ وَحَيَوِيَّتَهُمُ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ تَدْرِيجِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Ova mjesta postepeno gube puls svojih izvornih stanovnika i njihovu svakodnevnu vitalnost.
sentences.translationEn: An urgent need has emerged to adopt the concept of comprehensive and conscious sustainability.

sentences.arabic: بَرَزَتِ الْحَاجَةُ الْمَاسَّةُ لِتَبَنِّي مَفْهُومِ الِاسْتِدَامَةِ الشَّامِلَةِ وَالْوَاعِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pojavila se hitna potreba za usvajanjem koncepta sveobuhvatne i svjesne održivosti.
sentences.translationEn: This strategy aims to create a balance between economics and preservation.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ الِاسْتِرَاتِيجِيَّةُ إِلَى خَلْقِ تَوَازُنٍ بَيْنَ الِاقْتِصَادِ وَالْحِفْظِ.
sentences.translation: Ova strategija ima za cilj stvaranje ravnoteže između ekonomije i očuvanja.
sentences.translationEn: Conserving civilizational heritage is a fundamental trust for future generations.

sentences.arabic: صَوْنُ الْمَوْرُوثِ الْحَضَارِيِّ هُوَ أَمَانَةٌ جَوْهَرِيَّةٌ لِلْأَجْيَالِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Očuvanje civilizacijskog naslijeđa suštinski je emanet za buduće generacije.
sentences.translationEn: Destination management is no longer just about organizing transient trips

sentences.arabic: إِدَارَةُ الْوَجْهَاتِ السِّياحِيَّةِ لَمْ تَعُدْ مُجَرَّدَ تَنْظِيمٍ لِلرِّحْلَاتِ الْعَابِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Upravljanje turističkim destinacijama više nije puko organiziranje prolaznih putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: it has become a precise science based on regulating the annual flow of visitors.

sentences.arabic: أَضْحَتْ عِلْمًا دَقِيقًا يَرْتَكِزُ عَلَى تَقْنِينِ تَدَفُّقِ الزَّوَّارِ سَنَوِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Ono je postalo precizna nauka koja se temelji na reguliranju godišnjeg protoka posjetitelja.
sentences.translationEn: Environmental and aesthetic awareness must be enhanced among all travelers.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ تَعْزِيزُ الْوَعْيِ الْبِيئِيِّ وَالْجَمَالِيِّ لَدَى جَمِيعِ الْمُسَافِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Potrebno je osnažiti ekološku i estetsku svijest kod svih putnika.
sentences.translationEn: The educated traveler is well aware of their deep moral responsibility toward the place.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسَافِرُ الْمُثَقَّفُ يَعِي جَيِّدًا مَسْؤُولِيَّتَهُ الْأَخْلَاقِيَّةَ الْعَمِيقَةَ تِجَاهَ الْمَكَانِ.
sentences.translation: Obrazovan putnik dobro je svjestan svoje duboke moralne odgovornosti prema mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: Every step over ancient ruins is a major historical responsibility.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ خُطْوَةٍ فَوْقَ الْآثَارِ الْقَدِيمَةِ هِيَ أَمَانَةٌ تَارِيخِيَّةٌ كُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Svaki korak preko drevnih starina predstavlja veliki historijski emanet.
sentences.translationEn: Promoting dignified tourism requires broad and effective international cooperation.

sentences.arabic: تَعْزِيزُ السِّياحَةِ الرَّصِينَةِ يَتَطَلَّبُ تَعَاوُنًا دُوَلِيًّا وَاسِعًا وَفَعَّالًا.
sentences.translation: Promoviranje ozbiljnog turizma zahtijeva široku i efikasnu međunarodnu saradnju.
sentences.translationEn: Protecting World Heritage sites is an utmost necessity that brooks no delay.

sentences.arabic: حِمَايَةُ مَوَاقِعِ التُّرَاثِ الْعَالَمِيِّ ضَرُورَةٌ قُصْوَى لَا تَقْبَلُ التَّأْجِيلَ.
sentences.translation: Zaštita lokaliteta svjetske baštine krajnja je nužnost koja ne trpi odlaganje.
sentences.translationEn: The risks of accelerated and destructive tourist consumption must be curtailed.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ الْحَدُّ مِنْ مَخَاطِرِ الِاسْتِهْلَاكِ السِّياحِيِّ الْمُتَسَارِعِ وَالْمُدَمِّرِ.
sentences.translation: Moraju se ograničiti rizici ubrzane i destruktivne turističke potrošnje.
sentences.translationEn: The ultimate goal of travel is to celebrate unique human diversity.

sentences.arabic: الْغَايَةُ الْأَسْمَى لِلرِّحْلَةِ هِيَ الِاحْتِفَاءُ بِالتَّنَوُّعِ الْبَشَرِيِّ الْفَرِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Uzvišeni cilj putovanja je proslavljanje jedinstvene ljudske raznolikosti.
sentences.translationEn: The core of local identities and their authentic traditions must remain untouched.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَدَمُ الْمَسَاسِ بِجَوْهَرِ الْهُوِيَّاتِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ وَتَقَالِيدِهَا الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ne smije se narušavati srž lokalnih identiteta i njihovih autentičnih tradicija.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, these treasures remain eternal witnesses to human genius.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا تَبْقَى الْكُنُوزُ شَوَاهِدَ خَالِدَةً عَلَى عَبْقَرِيَّةِ الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Tako ova blaga ostaju vječni svjedoci ljudske genijalnosti.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, these treasures remain eternal witnesses to human genius.
